description: Bounded repair loop for failing PR checks. A maximum of two repair attempts; each attempt stays on the same task branch and inside the original authorized scope, adds a new commit, preserves prior commits, reruns the failed checks, and reports the exact failure category. Never auto-merges, never auto-deploys.
attemptRules: remain on the same task feature branch
remain strictly inside the original authorized scope
create a new commit (never amend, never force-push)
stop after two unsuccessful attempts and escalate to OWNER_REVIEW

escalation.onProhibitedCategory: stop immediately and escalate to owner (state BLOCKED/OWNER_REVIEW); do not attempt an automatic repair
escalation.onMaxAttemptsExceeded: stop and escalate to OWNER_REVIEW; do not attempt a third repair
